TEB3133 / TFB3133
Data Visualization Project

AI Impact on Student Performance

Is AI a Tutor or a Cheat Code?
How does generative AI shape academic outcomes, skill retention, and well-being?
A comprehensive dataset capturing how Generative AI tool usage shapes across 50,000 students.

100%

Overview
FIG. S1

Distribution of Primary AI Tool Purposes

How students use GenAI tools — homework, study, writing, or research.

FIG. S2

Personal GPA vs AI Usage

GPA improvement and AI usage hours grouped by usage level.

Hover for details
FIG. S3

Multidimensional Student Learning Profile

Radar chart showing the average student profile across key dimensions.

Hover for details
FIG. S4

Paid Subscription Adoption Among Students

Percentage of students using paid subscriptions vs free plans. Click a slice to filter.

Click to filter
FIG. S5

Relationship Between AI Usage and Post-Semester GPA

Brush to select; search an ID to spotlight. (Shows a representative sample of up to 5,000 records for performance.)

Brush + search
FIG. L1

AI Usage Level Distribution Across Years of Study

Distribution of AI usage levels (Low, Moderate, High, Very High) across different years of study.

Hover For details
FIG. L2

Post-Semester GPA Frequency Distribution

Histogram of Post‑Semester GPA.

Distribution
FIG. L3

Cohort Size by Year of Study with Major Drill-Down

Click a bar to drill into that year's majors.

Drill‑down
← Back to all years
FIG. L4

Monthly Trajectory of GPA Change and AI Usage Hours

Track how average GPA improvement and AI usage hours evolve month by month – useful for identifying seasonal patterns and policy timing.

Dual‑axis
FIG. L5

Monthly Trajectory of GPA Change and Exam Anxiety

Average GPA improvement (green) against average exam‑anxiety (blue).

Dual‑axis
FIG. E1

Weekly AI Tool Adoption Growth Trajectory

Average weekly AI usage hours across the semester – shows adoption growth.

Trend
FIG. E2

Average AI Usage Hours by Major Programme

Average AI usage hours by major – click a bar to filter.

Click to filter
FIG. E3

Programme-Level Distribution of AI Usage and Student Count

Treemap showing student count (area) and average AI usage hours (colour) per major – quickly identify which programmes have highest AI adoption.

Hover for details
Advanced Analytics

Deeper multivariate and cohort‑level charts – drilldown, heatmaps, parallel coordinates, and monthly trajectories.

GPA Change Interaction: Major vs. Primary AI Use Case

GPA change by colour. Click a cell to filter.

Multivariate Student Profiles (Parallel Coordinates)

Drag any axis to brush and cross‑filter. (Display a representative sample of up to 5,000 records)

FIG. A3

Pairwise Correlation Matrix of Key Academic Metrics

Compare multiple variables at once. Hover points for details. (Sample of up to 5,000 records.)
